channel.title: Indexify Blog – SEO & Google Ads Insights
channel.description: Expert guides on SEO and Google Ads for South African businesses. No fluff — only strategies that move the needle.

item.title: Why Your Business Isn't Ranking on Google (And How to Fix It)
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Discover the most common reasons South African businesses don't rank on Google and the exact steps to fix your visibility in 2026.

item.title: Local SEO in South Africa: How to Dominate Google Maps Results
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Learn how to rank in Google Maps and the local pack for your South African business. Step-by-step local SEO strategy for 2026.

item.title: Technical SEO Checklist for South African Websites in 2026
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: A complete technical SEO checklist for South African businesses. Fix crawling, indexing, speed, and mobile issues that are killing your rankings.

item.title: What Is On-Page SEO and Why Does It Matter for Your Business?
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: On-page SEO explained for South African business owners. Learn what it is, why it matters, and how to optimise every page to rank higher on Google.

item.title: The Power of Backlinks: Building Domain Authority in South Africa
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Learn why backlinks are Google's #1 ranking factor and how South African businesses can build authoritative links that push them to page 1.

item.title: SEO vs Google Ads: Which Is Right for Your Business in 2026?
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: SEO or Google Ads — which delivers better ROI for South African businesses? Compare both strategies with real numbers and find out which fits your goals.

item.title: How Long Does SEO Take to Show Results? The Honest Answer
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: How long before SEO delivers results? We break down realistic timelines for South African businesses and what you can expect month by month.

item.title: Keyword Research for South African Businesses: A Complete Guide
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: How to find the right keywords for your South African business. A step-by-step keyword research guide tailored to the local search landscape.

item.title: Core Web Vitals: The Google Ranking Factor You Cannot Ignore
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Understand Core Web Vitals and how they affect your Google rankings. Learn what LCP, INP, and CLS mean and how to improve them for your South African website.

item.title: How to Write SEO Content That Ranks on Google and Converts Visitors
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Learn how to write SEO-optimised content that ranks on Google AND converts visitors into paying clients. A practical guide for South African businesses.

item.title: Schema Markup Explained: Boost Your Click-Through Rate on Google
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Schema markup helps your website appear with rich results on Google — star ratings, FAQs, prices. Here's how to implement it for your South African business.

item.title: Google Ads vs Facebook Ads: Which Is Better for Your Business?
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Google Ads vs Facebook Ads for South African businesses. Compare targeting, costs, conversion rates, and ROI to choose the right platform for your goals.

item.title: How Much Should You Spend on Google Ads in South Africa?
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: How much does Google Ads cost in South Africa? We break down realistic budgets by industry and explain how to calculate the right spend for your goals.

item.title: Understanding Google Ads Quality Score and How to Improve It
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Quality Score determines what you pay per click on Google Ads. Learn how it's calculated and how to improve it to pay less and rank higher than competitors.

item.title: Google Ads Bidding Strategies: Which One Should You Use?
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Manual CPC, Target CPA, Maximise Conversions — which Google Ads bidding strategy is right for your campaign? A clear guide for South African advertisers.

item.title: How to Write Google Ads Copy That Converts in South Africa
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Learn how to write Google Ads headlines and descriptions that get clicks and drive conversions for South African businesses. Includes proven frameworks and examples.

item.title: Google Ads Conversion Tracking: Why It's Non-Negotiable
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Without conversion tracking, Google Ads is just guesswork. Learn how to set up conversion tracking for your South African business and make data-driven decisions.

item.title: The 8 Biggest Google Ads Mistakes South African Businesses Make
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Avoid these costly Google Ads mistakes that waste thousands of rands monthly for South African businesses. Our expert analysis of what goes wrong and why.

item.title: Negative Keywords: The Secret to Stopping Wasted Google Ads Spend
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Negative keywords prevent your Google Ads from showing for irrelevant searches. Learn how to build a negative keyword list that protects your budget in South Africa.

item.title: Google Ads Remarketing: How to Re-Capture Lost Visitors and Convert Them
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Google Ads remarketing shows ads to people who already visited your website. Learn how to set up remarketing campaigns that re-engage and convert lost visitors.

item.title: How to Structure Your Google Ads Campaigns for Maximum ROI
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: The right Google Ads structure maximises Quality Score and ROI. Learn the campaign, ad group, and keyword hierarchy that consistently delivers the best results.

item.title: Digital Marketing for South African SMEs: Where to Start in 2026
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: A practical guide to digital marketing for small and medium businesses in South Africa. Learn where to start, what to prioritise, and how to avoid common mistakes.

item.title: How to Generate More Leads Online for Your South African Business in 2026
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Proven strategies to generate more online leads for South African businesses in 2026. From SEO to Google Ads to conversion optimisation — here's what works.

item.title: The Difference Between SEO and SEM: What SA Businesses Need to Know
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: SEO vs SEM — what's the difference and which should you invest in? A clear guide for South African businesses on organic vs paid search strategy.

item.title: Website Conversion Rate Optimisation: Turn Visitors Into Paying Clients
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Learn conversion rate optimisation (CRO) strategies to turn more website visitors into paying clients. Practical CRO tips for South African businesses.

item.title: Why Page Speed Affects Both Your SEO Rankings and Google Ads Quality Score
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Page speed is a ranking factor for both organic SEO and Google Ads Quality Score. Learn how slow pages cost you money in both channels and how to fix them.

item.title: How to Track ROI from Your Digital Marketing Campaigns in South Africa
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Learn how to properly measure return on investment from your digital marketing. Track SEO, Google Ads, and social media performance with the right tools.

item.title: Content Marketing and SEO: Why They Work Better Together
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Content marketing and SEO are most powerful when aligned. Learn how a unified content-SEO strategy drives organic traffic and qualified leads for South African businesses.

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Ranking on Google Page 1 in South Africa
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: A comprehensive guide to ranking on Google's first page for South African businesses. Covers SEO strategy, timeline, and what it takes to reach the top.

item.title: Why Your Competitor Ranks Higher Than You on Google (And How to Overtake Them)
item.dc:creator: Indexify
item.description: Understand exactly why competitors outrank you on Google and the step-by-step process to analyse, match, and surpass them in search results.
